Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Regenerative Technology Bootstrap

As a community bootstrapping regenerative capacity I want to invest simultaneously in physical, knowledge, and governance infrastructure So that each investment makes the others more possible
Scenario Bootstrap pathway avoids Earth's suboptimal decisions
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Givenfossil fuel lock-in, nuclear stagnation, and TSMC geographic concentration exist
Andpharmaceutical API dependency on China persists at scale
Andlinear economy maintains only 9% plastic recycling
Whenthe community invests in regenerative infrastructure
Thencircular systems replace extractive patterns over time
Andbootstrap planning includes engineering and governance together
Scenario Industrial capacity serves as both problem and resource
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Giventhe manufacturing base provides regenerative build potential
Whenthe community needs energy, materials, and knowledge coordination
Thencircular systems are built without recreating 620 EJ/year of industrial power
Andthe bootstrap sequence moves from survival through advanced industry
Scenario Physical, knowledge, and governance infrastructure invest together
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Giveninvestment in physical infrastructure includes energy, water, and materials
Andinvestment in knowledge infrastructure includes coordination systems, governance protocols, and skill repositories
Andinvestment in governance infrastructure includes Ostrom-principle commons, reputation systems, and dispute resolution
Whenone investment area grows
Thenit makes the other two investment areas more possible
Andno single investment area can succeed alone
Scenario Knowledge layer enables community-scale coordination
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Givensupply chain software, GPS logistics, and marketplace platforms coordinate global manufacturing
Whenthe same digital infrastructure serves community-scale regenerative systems
Thenknowledge coordination operates without starting from scratch
Andthe community configures existing infrastructure for regenerative purposes
Scenario Suboptimal decisions had technical and governance roots
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Giventhorium LFTR was abandoned for weapons-program reasons
Andpharmaceutical API concentration was driven by IP maximalism
Whenthe community makes technical decisions
Thengovernance implications are evaluated alongside engineering choices
Andthe same failure modes are prevented in the bootstrap sequence
Scenario Bootstrap success requires three simultaneous investments
Giventhe global manufacturing capacity produces $12.3T annual gross output
And1.2 billion workers operate across 220 EJ energy consumption
And90 billion tonnes of raw material extraction occurs annually
Andthe current industrial capacity is locked into extractive patterns
Giveninvestment in physical infrastructure alone
Andinvestment in knowledge infrastructure alone
Andinvestment in governance infrastructure alone
Whenany single investment operates without the others
Thenthe system collapses
Andall three must grow together to reach advanced industry phase

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
